title: Create and configure a hook
story: As a framework developer, I want to create a hook by copying the template, configuring triggers in hook.yaml, and writing a script, so that my domain-specific tooling runs automatically at the right workflow moments.

title: Hook blocks with agent retry and user escalation
story: As a framework developer, I want my validation hook to block gate advancement when it finds issues, and I want the agent to try fixing the issue automatically before escalating to me.

title: Friendly trigger names in hook.yaml
story: As a framework developer, I want to use friendly phase names like post-implementation in my hook.yaml triggers instead of internal identifiers, so that I don't have to memorize phase numbers.

title: Post-workflow notifications
story: As a team lead, I want to run notification scripts after workflows complete, so that the team is automatically informed of workflow outcomes.

title: Per-hook timeout and severity configuration
story: As a team lead, I want to configure per-hook timeouts and severity levels so that slow validation tools have enough time and the agent knows how aggressively to fix issues.

title: Hook authoring reference
story: As a framework developer, I want a brief reference guide explaining hook setup and the hook.yaml schema, with links to Claude Code docs for detailed concepts.

title: Misconfigured hook warnings
story: As a framework developer, I want to be warned at session start if my hooks are misconfigured, so that I can fix issues before they cause confusion during a workflow.

title: Hook template delivered with framework
story: As a framework developer, I want the hook-template.yaml to be available after install/update so I can copy it to create new hooks without looking up phase names.
